title: ReclassifyRelationResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag reclassify-relation` on stdout as a single JSON line. Renames a relation type across matching edges (single or batch mode). Exit codes: 0 success, 1 validation error, 4 edge not found.

action.description: 'reclassified' when changes were applied, 'dry_run' when previewed only.

from_relation.description: Original relation type that was renamed.

to_relation.description: New relation type assigned to the edges.

merged_duplicates.description: Edges that collided with an existing (source, target, to_relation) triple and were removed rather than renamed.

namespace.description: Namespace the operation was applied to.
